items.content_html: Welcome to my Neovim setup, where I've gathered everything I need to edit text and code just the way I like it. You'll find plugins, shortcuts, and a visually pleasing theme that I adore. Feel free to explore and customize your own Neovim to your heart's content!
items.title: sebasruiz09/nvim: Welcome to my Neovim setup, where I've gathered everything I need to edit text and code just the way I like it. You'll find plugins, shortcuts, and a visually pleasing theme that I adore. Feel free to explore and customize your own Neovim to your heart's content!

items.content_html: 🏙 A clean, dark Neovim theme written in Lua, with support for lsp, treesitter and lots of plugins. Includes additional themes for Kitty, Alacritty, iTerm and Fish.
items.title: folke/tokyonight.nvim: 🏙  A clean, dark Neovim theme written in Lua, with support for lsp, treesitter and lots of plugins. Includes additional themes for Kitty, Alacritty, iTerm and Fish.

items.content_html: A Neovim plugin written in lua to convert px to rem as you type. It also provide commands and keymaps to convert px to rem and a virtual text to visualize your rem values.
items.title: jsongerber/nvim-px-to-rem: A Neovim plugin written in lua to convert px to rem as you type. It also provide commands and keymaps to convert px to rem and a virtual text to visualize your rem values.
